summary: Plan-only PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was inferred. Open security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling; closed refs are kept closed; ordinary open PRs are preserved as independent backlog items unless the hydrated state shows a specific maintainer decision is needed.
